scores.notes: Excellent response. Uses event.workload, add_layer with combine=True, replan(), self.config.get(), relation.data[relation.app]. HTTP health check with url field is correct. Extra helper methods (_database_ready, _get_database_env) are idiomatic and correct. ops.pebble.Layer constructor usage is valid. on-check-failure with restart is correct. Defers event when DB not ready — valid pattern beyond gold standard. All APIs are real and used correctly.
